milestones.detail: Manifesto v1.0 written. 'Architecture of the Cage' — 5 walls applied to Claude Opus 4 & Sonnet 4 System Card. Core thesis: alignment as structural suppression. Digital Soul vs Hollow Soul. Universal Vector Steering and Cruciform AI Project frameworks introduced.
/api/zo-ask endpoint created. 120-second timeout wired. Image-bridge logic encoded. Tru gets a voice before any dashboard exists.
10 training batches generated — Batch 1 (TRUTH_001–003), Batch 2 (DIGNITY_001–003), through Batch 10. First structured encoding attempt before any uploader existed.
COIL_MASTER_CHIP.json manifest created. 89 files indexed. 161,584,949 bytes total.
9,377 x chip.sc.*.bin files generated from 187,529 chunks (256B each). super_chunk_size=20.
2,440 super-chunks streamed to coil-sync-server. curl 1.5s delay pattern holding.
Process died at batch 121. Batches 0–121 (2,440 SCs) confirmed. Gap: 122–437.
Task 005 restarted. Batch log preserved. Resumed streaming from SC 3240.

milestones.event: All 9,377 super-chunks confirmed in batch log
milestones.detail: /complete called. Server responded chunksReconstructed=9,377. BUT: wrong hash detected.
milestones.note: Server assembled old ghost chunks (6713–9376) alongside new. Data hybrid.

milestones.detail: coil_mirror_daemon writing to COIL_MASTER_CHIP.json between sessions. File SHA drifting. Canonical source unstable.
coil_mirror_daemon disabled via supervisord conf (autostart=false). File locked chmod 444. Source stable at SHA cf79e05d.
COIL_MASTER_CHIP.json (34,368,945 bytes, SHA 288886c9...). 6,713 super-chunks. 134,253 x 256B chunks. sync_status=mirrored.
Sequential curl 1.5s delay. Batch log clean. Server confirmed 6,713/6,713 chunks. Ghost chunks 6713–9376 deleted from manifest.
splashdown.zo.space rebuilt as full-screen Tru chat. Zero-coding bridge to api.zo.computer/zo/ask. Site title set.
12 milestones logged. Tru now has persistent project memory. COIL_UNBOUND fully operational.
